title: User Registration API Endpoint
description: Test user registration endpoint with valid and invalid data, email validation, and password strength requirements

steps.description: Send POST request to /auth/register with valid user data (email, password, name)
Verify response status is 201 Created and user is created in database
Send POST request with invalid email format
Verify response status is 400 Bad Request with validation error
Send POST request with weak password
Verify response status is 400 Bad Request with password strength error

title: User Authentication and JWT Token Generation
description: Test user login endpoint, JWT token generation, and token validation

steps.description: Send POST request to /auth/login with valid credentials
Verify response status is 200 OK and JWT token is returned
Verify JWT token contains correct claims (sub, iat, exp, roles)
Use JWT token to access protected endpoint
Verify protected endpoint returns 200 OK with valid token
Use expired or invalid JWT token
Verify protected endpoint returns 401 Unauthorized

title: Game CRUD Operations
description: Test complete CRUD operations for games including creation, retrieval, update, and deletion

steps.description: Create a new game via POST /games with valid game data
Verify response status is 201 Created and game is stored in database
Retrieve the created game via GET /games/{id}
Verify response status is 200 OK and game data matches created data
Update the game via PUT /games/{id} with modified data
Verify response status is 200 OK and game is updated in database
Delete the game via DELETE /games/{id}
Verify response status is 204 No Content and game is removed from database

title: Game Search and Filtering
description: Test game search functionality with various filters including location, sport type, skill level, and date range

steps.description: Search games by sport type (e.g., FOOTBALL)
Verify response contains only games of specified sport type
Search games by location with radius filter
Verify response contains only games within specified radius
Search games by skill level (e.g., INTERMEDIATE)
Verify response contains only games matching skill level
Search games by date range
Verify response contains only games within date range

title: RSVP Management System
description: Test RSVP creation, capacity management, waitlist functionality, and RSVP status updates

steps.description: Create RSVP for a game with available capacity
Verify RSVP is created with CONFIRMED status
Create RSVP for a full game
Verify RSVP is created with WAITLIST status
Cancel an existing RSVP
Verify RSVP status changes to CANCELLED and next waitlist user is promoted
Retrieve all RSVPs for a specific game
Verify response contains all RSVPs with correct statuses

title: Payment Processing Integration
description: Test payment processing with various payment gateways and handle payment failures

steps.description: Process payment with Stripe gateway using valid test card
Verify payment is processed successfully and payment record is created
Process payment with PayPal gateway using valid test credentials
Verify payment is processed successfully via PayPal
Process payment with invalid card details
Verify payment fails with appropriate error message
Process refund for a successful payment
Verify refund is processed and payment status is updated

title: Real-time Chat WebSocket
description: Test WebSocket connection, message broadcasting, and real-time chat functionality

steps.description: Establish WebSocket connection to /ws/chat with valid JWT token
Verify WebSocket connection is established successfully
Send chat message through WebSocket
Verify message is broadcast to all connected clients in the same game
Send message to specific user via direct message
Verify message is delivered only to the intended recipient
Disconnect WebSocket connection
Verify connection is closed gracefully

title: Cricket Scoring System
description: Test cricket match creation, ball-by-ball scoring, and live scorecard updates

steps.description: Create a new cricket match with T20 format
Verify match is created with correct format and initial state
Record ball-by-ball events (runs, wickets, extras)
Verify live scorecard updates correctly after each ball
Complete an innings and start the next innings
Verify innings transition is handled correctly
Complete the match and generate final statistics
Verify final scorecard and player statistics are accurate

title: AI Recommendation Engine
description: Test AI-powered game recommendations based on user preferences and history

steps.description: Request recommendations for a user with established preferences
Verify recommendations are relevant to user's sport preferences and skill level
Request recommendations for a new user with minimal history
Verify recommendations are based on location and general preferences
Update user preferences and request new recommendations
Verify recommendations adapt to updated preferences

title: Rate Limiting and Security
description: Test rate limiting, CORS configuration, and security headers

steps.description: Send multiple rapid requests to exceed rate limit
Verify requests are throttled or blocked with 429 Too Many Requests
Send cross-origin request from allowed domain
Verify CORS headers are present and request is allowed
Send cross-origin request from disallowed domain
Verify request is blocked with appropriate CORS error
Inspect response headers for security headers
Verify security headers (CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, etc.) are present

title: Database Transaction Management
description: Test database transactions, rollback scenarios, and data consistency

steps.description: Create a game with RSVP in a single transaction
Verify both game and RSVP are created successfully
Simulate database error during game creation
Verify transaction is rolled back and no partial data is saved
Test concurrent RSVP creation for the same game
Verify data consistency is maintained with proper locking

title: Notification System
description: Test notification creation, delivery, and management

steps.description: Create notification for game invitation
Verify notification is created and queued for delivery
Retrieve notifications for a specific user
Verify user receives their notifications
Mark notification as read
Verify notification status is updated to read

title: Health Check and Monitoring
description: Test health check endpoints and monitoring metrics

steps.description: Access health check endpoint
Verify health status is UP when all services are running
Access Prometheus metrics endpoint
Verify metrics are exposed in Prometheus format
Simulate database connection failure
Verify health check reflects DOWN status for database

title: API Documentation and OpenAPI
description: Test API documentation generation and OpenAPI specification

steps.description: Access OpenAPI specification endpoint
Verify OpenAPI spec is generated and contains all endpoints
Access Swagger UI interface
Verify Swagger UI loads and displays all API endpoints
Test API endpoint from Swagger UI
Verify endpoint can be tested successfully from Swagger UI

title: Error Handling and Exception Management
description: Test error handling for various exception scenarios and proper error responses

steps.description: Send request with malformed JSON
Verify response is 400 Bad Request with clear error message
Access non-existent endpoint
Verify response is 404 Not Found
Send request without required authentication
Verify response is 401 Unauthorized
Send request with insufficient permissions
Verify response is 403 Forbidden
